'''Saarn''' was an isolated and hidden [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] with vast, green grasslands.

==History==
Saarn was used for military training by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. It was later a remote surveillance outpost for the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].<ref name="CSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>

The planet was [[Raid on Saarn|attacked]] at the beginning of the [[Thrawn campaign]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> The [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Stormhawk (Imperial I-class)|''Stormhawk'']] executed a hit-and-fade attack on Saarn, wiping out New Republic personnel. [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] forces set up a listening post there to protect the movement of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].<ref name="CSWE" />
